heading: Officials authorized to approve leases
label: 396e Officials authorized to approve leases
text: The Secretary of the Interior may, in his discretion, authorize superintendents or other officials in the Indian Service to approve leases for oil, gas, or other mining purposes covering any restricted Indian lands, tribal or allotted.
notes: Repeal of Inconsistent ActsFor repeal of inconsistent acts, see section 7 of act , set out as a note under .May 11, 1938section 396a of this title
